# task-file-peek

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Right-panel preview for files referenced from a task description. Opens as a child pane (Miller column) of taskDetailPane.
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `taskFilePeekPane`
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` `task-file-peek` (path `file/:filePath*`)
